reasoning: The base rate of Russia launching an unprovoked invasion into a new country in any given 2-month window is extremely low (<1%), and practically 0% while its military is heavily bogged down in Ukraine. With only two months left until the resolution date and no indicators of a sudden geopolitical shift, the probability is at the minimum threshold.
